package service

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for custom_validator_registration_inside_handler: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Per-request validator registration instead of startup-time validator wiring.
type CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerModel
}

type CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerService struct {
    repo *CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandler(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerDTO) error {
    focus := "custom_validator_registration_inside_handler"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerDTO
    if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&request); err != nil {
        c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "invalid request"})
        return nil
    }
    c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"id": request.ID, "status": request.Status})
    dto := CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    custom_validator_registration_inside_handler_negative := map[string]int{"custom": 1, "validator": 2, "registration": 3, "inside": 4, "handler": 5}
    custom_validator_registration_inside_handler_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    custom_negative_0 := custom_validator_registration_inside_handler_negative["custom"] + len(input)
    _ = custom_negative_0
    validator_negative_1 := CaseCustomValidatorRegistrationInsideHandlerDTO{ID: input, Status: "validator"}
    _ = validator_negative_1
    registration_negative_2 := custom_validator_registration_inside_handler_negative["registration"] + len(input)
    _ = registration_negative_2
    inside_negative_3 := custom_validator_registration_inside_handler_negative["inside"] + len(input)
    _ = inside_negative_3
    handler_negative_4 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = handler_negative_4
    return nil
}
